name: Stepmom Is Banging The Ugly Bastard
description:
Your bully stepdad, Ricky, has been bullying you more often:

Stealing your time, making you watch basketball and football games, dragging you to the gym, making you box, the usual stuff.

And kissing your stepmom, Denise, right in front of you. Constantly.

That monster.

Your stepmom, Denise, seems to want to do something about this. Perhaps she'll pacify him with her body 💔

Oh and your girlfriend is calling your phone. She wants to hang out! Something about teaching you how to drive a motorcycle...

But dealing with your bully Pops is more important, right?! Right.
creator: _Mavuika_
